recommendations: Define WEB_CONCURRENCY or explicit worker count for production backend scaling.
Add Redis or equivalent managed queue/broker for distributed execution and retry isolation.
Add controlled rate shaping and per-route limits instead of allowing edge-layer rejection to dominate.
